text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm on my way to the library to
look for some useful books...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I've been searching for a few books to help me
prepare for my races, you see.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
However, I've only been able to locate one of
them, so I was mulling over what to do.
choice_data_list: What books were you looking for?
What books were you looking for?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Let's see... The Secrets to Running, The Essence of Speed, Running Stride: A Racing Memoir, as well as...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder continues to rattle off a long list of
other books she's after. It'll be a tough task trying
to find all of them.
choice_data_list:
For now, why not focus on the book you did
manage to find?
Why don't we look for them together?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That's a good point. I'll start reading it now.
Wasting my limited time overthinking this won't
do me any good anyway.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I see. Yes, this is quite useful! ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You'd be willing to help? Then I will happily take
you up on that offer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It takes a whole lot of time, but we manage to
find all the books Grass Wonder is looking for.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. You were most helpful!
Now I believe my studies will progress
swimmingly! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Helping Grass Wonder on her quest for
knowledge has made me a little more familiar
with the library's collection.
